title: Proteomics signature profiling (PSP): a novel contextualization approach for cancer proteomics.
author: Goh WW Lee YH Ramdzan ZM Sergot MJ Chung M Wong L
content: S-EPMC3472506 PMC3472506 Proteomics signature profiling (PSP): a novel contextualization approach for cancer proteomics. Traditional proteomics analysis is plagued by the use of arbitrary thresholds resulting in large loss of information. We propose here a novel method in proteomics that utilizes
